revision.comment: twitter -> X per request, also improve code readability
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]

<includeonly>[http://twitter.com/{{{1|{{{id}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}] on [[Twitter]]</includeonly><noinclude>{{tfd|Twitter}}{{documentation}}</noinclude>

Bow Wow is in love with Ceacea Kandy Dave . In January 23, 2009 , Bow Wow ask Ceacea If she marry him . She said yes. In March 9 , 2009 , they have a Beach Wedding . And they made a album Called The Sex & Love Story Of Ceacea Kandy Dave & Bow Wow . Is about them in love and having sex

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter (identifier)|Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.text: <includeonly>[http://twitter.com/{{{1|{{{id}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}] on [[Twitter]]</includeonly><noinclude>{{tfd|Twitter}}{{documentation}}</noinclude>
[http://twitter.com/{{{1|{{{id}}}}}} {{{2|{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}] on [[Twitter]]<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

Bow Wow is in love with Ceacea Kandy Dave . In January 23, 2009 , Bow Wow ask Ceacea If she marry him . She said yes. In March 9 , 2009 , they have a Beach Wedding . And they made a album Called The Sex & Love Story Of Ceacea Kandy Dave & Bow Wow . Is about them in love and having sex

revision.comment: updated code for twitter, per request
Link to Twitter via https, per talk request
rm disambig from title per talk
Remove any leading spaces from 1st unnamed parameter that would break link. Tested first at [[Template:Twitter/sandbox]] and [[Template:Twitter/testcases]].
Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update so testing for [[:Category:Twitter username different from Wikidata]] ignores upper/lower case differences between username in template and username in Wikidata. Tested first with [[/sandbox]].
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: use identifier link similar to IMDb templates
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter (identifier)|Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

Bow Wow is in love with Ceacea Kandy Dave . In January 23, 2009 , Bow Wow ask Ceacea If she marry him . She said yes. In March 9 , 2009 , they have a Beach Wedding . And they made a album Called The Sex & Love Story Of Ceacea Kandy Dave & Bow Wow . Is about them in love and having sex

revision.comment: updated code for twitter, per request
Link to Twitter via https, per talk request
rm disambig from title per talk
Remove any leading spaces from 1st unnamed parameter that would break link. Tested first at [[Template:Twitter/sandbox]] and [[Template:Twitter/testcases]].
Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update so testing for [[:Category:Twitter username different from Wikidata]] ignores upper/lower case differences between username in template and username in Wikidata. Tested first with [[/sandbox]].
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: use identifier link similar to IMDb templates
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter (identifier)|Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

Bow Wow is in love with Ceacea Kandy Dave . In January 23, 2009 , Bow Wow ask Ceacea If she marry him . She said yes. In March 9 , 2009 , they have a Beach Wedding . And they made a album Called The Sex & Love Story Of Ceacea Kandy Dave & Bow Wow . Is about them in love and having sex

revision.comment: updated code for twitter, per request
Link to Twitter via https, per talk request
rm disambig from title per talk
Remove any leading spaces from 1st unnamed parameter that would break link. Tested first at [[Template:Twitter/sandbox]] and [[Template:Twitter/testcases]].
Update handling of missing ID (previous placement of category prevented it from being included).
If Wikidata property has multiple values, only use first one. Remove {{Trim|}} since {{#if:}} does same.

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Update so testing for [[:Category:Twitter username different from Wikidata]] ignores upper/lower case differences between username in template and username in Wikidata. Tested first with [[/sandbox]].
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: use identifier link similar to IMDb templates
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{#property:P2002}} | [https://twitter.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{id}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P2002}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}] on [[Twitter (identifier)|Twitter]]{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P2002|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}{{WikidataCheck|property=P2002|value={{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|category=Twitter username|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1|ignorecase=1}} | {{[[Template:Twitter|Twitter]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|[[Category:Twitter template missing ID and not in Wikidata]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using Twitter with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Twitter]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | id | name }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: twitter -> X per request, also improve code readability
per edit request on talk page - include missing semicolon
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
